name: Code Mycelial Network Specification
synopsis: Code Mycelial Network (CMN) specification — normative documents, JSON schemas, and conformance test vectors for sovereign code distribution
intent: Provide the complete normative specification for the Code Mycelial Network protocol — seven chapters covering Substrate (discovery & identity), Mycelium (domain manifest), Spore (package format), Taste (safety evaluation), Strain (conventions), URI (addressing), and Algorithm Registry

Ship machine-readable JSON Schema definitions (cmn.json, mycelium.json, spore-core.json, spore.json, taste.json) for validating all protocol artifacts, plus conformance test vectors (merkle, signature, uri, capsule, taste gating, key rotation, bond traversal) so implementers can verify correctness without reading prose
mutations: Restructure spore.json schema — split $defs/spore_core into draft-matching base (spore_core) and release overlay (spore_core_released), ensuring draft and published schemas share a single source of truth
Tighten schema required fields — make previous_keys and endpoints required in cmn.json capsules, notes optional in taste core, synopsis optional in mycelium spore entries
Add CORS requirement and require protocol_versions in cmn.json — domains MUST serve CMN endpoints with Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * and MUST declare supported protocol versions

Redesign mycelium endpoint — hash (string, required) is the primary authoritative shard for display; hashes (array, optional) carries overflow shards for large domains whose spore lists are merged for search
Introduce extends bond relation for explicit strain hierarchy — strains use extends for family edges, follows for service contracts; remove implements/inspired_by/related_to from predefined relations

Rewrite 05-strain chapter — focus on design rationale (why conventions as spores, why non-transitive, why non-recursive conformance), Synapse as worked example of modular strain composition, and how to extend/create your own strains

Update conformance vectors — align strain vectors with extends semantics, substrate vectors with hash field and required previous_keys/protocol_versions, spore vectors with size_bytes and updated_at_epoch_ms

bonds.reason: Uses agent-first-data naming conventions for all field names (e.g., updated_at_epoch_ms, cost_msats, created_at_epoch_s)
